gt_sql: SELECT T3.Tags FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN postHistory AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId INNER JOIN posts AS T3 ON T3.Id = T2.PostId WHERE T1.DisplayName = 'Mark Meckes' AND T3.CommentCount = 0
pred_sql:
SELECT p.Tags
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE TRIM(u.DisplayName) = 'Mark Meckes'
  AND p.CommentCount = 0
  AND p.Tags IS NOT NULL;
question: State all the tags used by Mark Meckes in his posts that doesn't have comments.
